_meta.description: Metadata for the CoreSight register data file

ETM.title: Embedded Trace Macrocell
ETM.brief: ETMv4 (ETE) registers control instruction and data trace generation. One ETM per PE.

CTI.title: Cross-Trigger Interface
CTI.brief: CTI registers control cross-trigger channels connecting debug and trace components.

STM.title: System Trace Macrocell
STM.brief: STM registers control system-level software-generated trace via stimulus ports.

ITM.title: Instrumentation Trace Macrocell
ITM.brief: ITM stimulus port and control registers for software trace on Cortex-M profiles.

ID_BLOCK.title: Common Identification Block
ID_BLOCK.brief: Standard CoreSight identification registers present in every 4 KB component frame (offsets 0xF00–0xFFC).

v1.brief: CoreSight Architecture v1 — Original cross-trigger and trace bus architecture

v2.brief: CoreSight Architecture v2 — Adds ATB topology and memory-mapped ROM table

v3.brief: CoreSight Architecture v3 — Adds DEVARCH, SelfHosted trace, ETE support
